title: Limited Random Forest Optimization
tagline: Accuracy + runtime improvements via feature selection and constrained depth
problem: Baseline models lacked the right trade-off between predictive accuracy and execution time for production use-cases.
approach: Performed EDA and feature analysis to identify key drivers.
Implemented constrained tree depth and optimized feature selection to reduce overfitting and speed up inference.
Validated improvements with standard evaluation metrics and repeated experiments.
outcome: Delivered a stronger accuracy/runtime trade-off suitable for business usage.
Produced stakeholder-ready findings to support adoption.

title: Supervised ML Modeling Suite
tagline: End-to-end pipeline: EDA → features → training → evaluation
problem: Teams needed a repeatable approach for building, evaluating, and communicating supervised learning models.
approach: Created a standardized workflow for data cleaning, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
Automated metric generation (Accuracy, F1-score) and comparison across models.
Documented insights and recommendations for non-technical stakeholders.
outcome: Improved clarity and speed of iteration during model development.
Made results easier to communicate and act on.

title: Inventory & Distribution Tracking
tagline: Operational data tracking for community distribution
problem: Operational teams needed reliable records to support distribution efficiency and accountability.
approach: Managed distribution records and inventory logs with consistent formatting and validation checks.
Built lightweight reporting to support day-to-day operations and stock visibility.
outcome: More accurate tracking and smoother distribution workflows.
Better decision support for replenishment and planning.
